---
name: Feature request
about: Propose gameplay, content, or UX improvements
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / gap

What feels missing or weak today? (Link to route or file if you know it, e.g. `src/data/scenarios.ts`.)

## Proposed solution

Describe the change at a high level. Mockups optional (attach images).

## Gameplay / design impact

- Affects **scenario game**, **speak mode**, or **both**?
- Korean copy tone: does this stay aligned with awkward-survival humor?
- Demo reliability: does this add failure modes (network, keys, permissions)?

## Scope check

- [ ] Stays **frontend-only** (no required backend)
- [ ] No new secrets / API keys needed
- [ ] Fits hackathon MVP complexity

## Alternatives considered

Brief bullets.
